candidate.alt: Grace Bay, Providenciales - Turks and Caicos Islands. An old shot on my first DSLR. Using the kit lens and probably hand held, this was the only shot I kept of that sunset. This beach and the Atlantic Ocean's calm crystal clear water make this a very special place. One of the best beaches in the world.
candidate.wikimediaFile: Sunset in Grace Bay, Turks and Caicos Islands.jpg
candidate.title: File:Sunset in Grace Bay, Turks and Caicos Islands.jpg

candidate.alt: Northwestern Wyoming's 45 mile long, north-south oriented Teton Range is dominated by Archean-aged igneous and metamorphic rocks. The flat-floored valley on its eastern side is Jackson Hole Valley, where the equivalent Archean rocks are at a considerable depth underground. The Teton Range and Jackson Hole Valley are separated by a major normal fault called the Teton Fault, which has experienced about 30,000 feet worth of offset. The tallest mountain at the center of the above photograph is Grand Teton itself, which peaks out at 13,770 feet above sea level.
candidate.wikimediaFile: Grand Teton (Teton Range, Grand Teton National Park, Wyoming, USA) (19771495898).jpg
candidate.title: File:Grand Teton (Teton Range, Grand Teton National Park, Wyoming, USA) (19771495898).jpg

The Teton Range and Jackson Hole Valley are separated by a major normal fault called the Teton Fault, which has experienced about 30,000 feet worth of offset. candidate.alt: A barragem do Feiticeiro é uma obra de engenharia hidroeléctrica portuguesa construída para represar o rio Sabor, no distrito de Bragança, região de Trás-os-Montes. Características Técnicas Características Hidrológicas Área da Bacia Hidrográfica – 3491 Km² Caudal de cheia – 6400 m³/s Período de retorno – 5000 anos Características da Albufeira Área inundada ao NPA – 181 ha Nível de máxima cheia (NMC) – 138 m Nível mínimo de exploração (NmE) – 130 m Descarregador de Cheias Localização – central Tipo de controlo – comportas Tipo de descarregador – Lâmina livre dividido em 4 vãos de 16m Cota da crista da soleira – 127 m Desenvolvimento da soleira – 4x16 m Caudal máximo descarregado – 5000 m³/s Dissipação de energia – Roller Bucket Descarga de fundo Localização – estrutura da barragem Tipo – através da barragem/muro lateral direito do descarregador de cheias Secção da conduta – 1,25 m x (2-4) m Caudal máximo – 51.5 m³/s Controlo a montante – comporta vagão – (1.25m x 2.0m) Controlo a jusante – comporta vagão – (1.25m x 2.0m) Energias de Portugal vendeu a barragem a um consórcio francês em dezembro de 2019. <a href=" https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barragem_do_Feiticeiro " rel="noreferrer nofollow">pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barragem_do_Feiticeiro</a>
candidate.credit: Vitor Oliveira from Torres Vedras, PORTUGAL
candidate.title: File:Barragem do Feiticeiro - Portugal 🇵🇹 (54493453088).jpg
candidate.description: A barragem do Feiticeiro é uma obra de engenharia hidroeléctrica portuguesa construída para represar o rio Sabor, no distrito de Bragança, região de Trás-os-Montes. Características Técnicas Características Hidrológicas Área da Bacia Hidrográfica – 3491 Km² Caudal de cheia – 6400 m³/s Período de retorno – 5000 anos Características da Albufeira Área inundada ao NPA – 181 ha Nível de máxima cheia (NMC) – 138 m Nível mínimo de exploração (NmE) – 130 m Descarregador de Cheias Localização – central Tipo de controlo – comportas Tipo de descarregador – Lâmina livre dividido em 4 vãos de 16m Cota da crista da soleira – 127 m Desenvolvimento da soleira – 4x16 m Caudal máximo descarregado – 5000 m³/s Dissipação de energia – Roller Bucket Descarga de fundo Localização – estrutura da barragem Tipo – através da barragem/muro lateral direito do descarregador de cheias Secção da conduta – 1,25 m x (2-4) m Caudal máximo – 51.5 m³/s Controlo a montante – comporta vagão – (1.25m x 2.0m) Controlo a jusante – comporta vagão – (1.25m x 2.0m) Energias de Portugal vendeu a barragem a um consórcio francês em dezembro de 2019. <a href=" https://pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barragem_do_Feiticeiro " rel="noreferrer nofollow">pt.wikipedia.org/wiki/Barragem_do_Feiticeiro</a>

candidate.alt: The lighthouse of Cap de Formentor was erected between 1857 and 1863. It is located at 210 m above sea level and has a nominal range of 21 nautical miles (approx. 39 km). The light characteristic is 4 white flashes every 20 seconds.
candidate.title: File:Mallorca Cap de Formentor Faro.jpg
candidate.description: The lighthouse of Cap de Formentor was erected between 1857 and 1863. It is located at 210 m above sea level and has a nominal range of 21 nautical miles (approx. 39 km). The light characteristic is 4 white flashes every 20 seconds.

candidate.alt: Santa Fe is the capital of the United States state of New Mexico. It is the fourth-largest city in the state and is the seat of Santa Fe County. Santa Fe is also the oldest capital city in the United States. Santa Fe (meaning “holy faith” in Spanish) had a population of 69,204 in 2012.The city’s full name when founded was La Villa Real de la Santa Fe de San Francisco de Asís (“The Royal Town of the Holy Faith of St. Francis of Assisi”). Don Juan de Oñate led the first effort to colonize the region in 1598, establishing Santa Fe de Nuevo México as a province of New Spain. In 1610, he made it the capital of the province, which it has almost constantly remained, making it the oldest state capital in the United States. The Spanish laid out the city according to the “Laws of the Indies”, town planning rules and ordinances which had been established in 1573 by King Philip II. The fundamental principle was that the town be laid out around a central plaza. On its north side was the Palace of the Governors, while on the east was the church that later became the Cathedral Basilica of Saint Francis of Assisi. The city is well known as a center for arts that reflect the multicultural character of the city; it has been designated as a UNESCO Creative City in Design, Crafts and Folk Art. The city and the surrounding areas have a high concentration of artists. They have come over the decades to capture the natural beauty of the landscape, the flora and the fauna. One of the most well-known New Mexico–based artists was Georgia O'Keeffe, who lived for a time in Santa Fe, but primarily in Abiquiu, a small village about 50 mi (80 km) away. By an ordinance passed in 1957, new and rebuilt buildings, especially those in designated historic districts, must exhibit a Spanish Territorial or Pueblo style of architecture, with flat roofs and other features suggestive of the area's traditional adobe construction. en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Santa_Fe,_New_Mexico en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Text_of_Creative_Commons_...
candidate.title: File:Route 66, Santa Fe, New Mexico (cropped).jpg

The city is well known as a center for arts that reflect the multicultural character of the city; it has been designated as a UNESCO Creative City in Design, Crafts and Folk Art. The city and the surrounding areas have a high concentration of artists. They have come over the decades to capture the natural beauty of the landscape, the flora and the fauna. By an ordinance passed in 1957, new and rebuilt buildings, especially those in designated historic districts, must exhibit a Spanish Territorial or Pueblo style of architecture, with flat roofs and other features suggestive of the area's traditional adobe construction. en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Santa_Fe,_New_Mexico en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Wikipedia:Text_of_Creative_Commons_...
